heading: Effect on educational entitlement
label: 3493 Effect on educational entitlement
text: The educational assistance allowance or cost of individualized tutorial assistance authorized by this subchapter shall be paid without charge to any period of entitlement the veteran may have earned pursuant to .section 3461(a) of this title
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “3461(a)” for “1661(a)”.Pub. L. 102–83section 1693 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section and substituted “3461(a)” for “1661(a)”.Pub. L. 102–83section 1693 of this title
